videos.headline: Lewandowski's brace leads Bayern Munich to dominant 4-0 win
videos.title: Lewandowski's brace leads Bayern Munich to dominant 4-0 win
videos.caption: Bayern Munich gets three goals in the first and then a Robert Lewandowski tally early in the second half as they dominate Union Berlin 4-0 for the win.
videos.description: Bayern Munich gets three goals in the first and then a Robert Lewandowski tally early in the second half as they dominate Union Berlin 4-0 for the win.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Lewandowski’s brace leads Bayern Munich to dominant 4-0 win) 2022/03/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lewandowski converts from the spot for Bayern's third goal of the first half
videos.title: Lewandowski converts from the spot for Bayern's third goal of the first half
videos.caption: Robert Lewandowski draws the foul and converts the penalty, putting Bayern Munich up 3-0 before halftime.
videos.description: Robert Lewandowski draws the foul and converts the penalty, putting Bayern Munich up 3-0 before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Lewandowski converts from the spot for Bayern’s third goal of the first half) 2022/03/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Union Berlin, Freiburg battle to a tough draw
videos.title: Union Berlin, Freiburg battle to a tough draw
videos.caption: As two teams who are vying for a top-four spot, Union Berlin and Freiburg play to a hard fought 0-0 draw.
videos.description: As two teams who are vying for a top-four spot, Union Berlin and Freiburg play to a hard fought 0-0 draw.

tracking.trackingName: INET_SOC GER Highlight (Union Berlin, Freiburg battle to a tough draw) 2021/12/15 US ONLY

videos.headline: Union Berlin notches first win of the season vs. Gladbach
videos.title: Union Berlin notches first win of the season vs. Gladbach
videos.caption: Niko Gießelmann and Taiwo Awoniyi score as Union Berlin remains unbeaten after a 2-1 win over Borussia Monchengladbach.
videos.description: Niko Gießelmann and Taiwo Awoniyi score as Union Berlin remains unbeaten after a 2-1 win over Borussia Monchengladbach.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Union Berlin notches first win of the season vs. Gladbach) 2021/08/29 ESHEET
